columns.extraction_plan: The median on-treatment duration for the treatment arm (Orteronel) is not explicitly reported in the PDF. Table A1 (page 12) provides the 'Protocol/Postprotocol Treatment Status' showing the number of patients still on protocol treatment (192 out of 638) and those off protocol treatment (446 out of 638), but it does not provide a median duration for how long patients received the treatment. The abstract (page 1) and results section (page 4) mention a median follow-up of 4.9 years, but this refers to the study follow-up, not the duration of active treatment.

The median on-treatment duration for the control arm (Bicalutamide) is not explicitly reported in the PDF. Table A1 (page 12) provides the 'Protocol/Postprotocol Treatment Status' showing the number of patients still on protocol treatment (100 out of 641) and those off protocol treatment (541 out of 641), but it does not provide a median duration for how long patients received the treatment. The abstract (page 1) and results section (page 4) mention a median follow-up of 4.9 years, but this refers to the study follow-up, not the duration of active treatment.
